action.reasoning: Observation: Best eval score is 0.519 from iter_6. With only 0.533h remaining (~32 min), I have very limited time. The model has plateaued. Analysis: The best checkpoint is from iter_5/6 with mean_r2=0.519. I should submit eval with the best checkpoint to lock in the best score before time runs out. Decision: Submit eval with the best checkpoint.
